name: pi-subagent-toolbudget
description_en: Companion extension for pi-subagents: caps a spawned sub-agent's tool calls (soft nudge + hard stop) so runaway agents finalize instead of overflowing context. No-op outside sub-agents.
description_zh: pi-subagents 的配套扩展：限制生成的子代理的工具调用（软提示 + 硬停止），防止失控代理溢出上下文。在子代理外无操作。
